name: Baby Back Barbecue Ribs
recipeIngredient: 2 sheets Reynolds Wrap Heavy Duty Aluminum Foil (18x24 inches each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat grill to medium.
2. Cut each rack of ribs into thirds.
3. Place half of the ribs in a single layer on each foil sheet.
4. Combine brown sugar, paprika, garlic powder, and pepper in a small bowl.
5. Sprinkle the spice mixture evenly over the ribs.
6. Rub the spice mixture onto the ribs to coat them thoroughly.
7. Fold the sides of the foil sheets towards the center, leaving space for heat circulation inside the packet.
8. Fold the foil down at one end to seal it.
9. Add 1/4 cup water through the open end and fold the foil to seal.
10. Repeat steps 3-9 for the second packet.
11. Grill the ribs in covered grill for 45 minutes to 1 hour.
12. Remove the steamed ribs carefully from the foil and place them directly on the grill.
13. Grill the ribs uncovered for 10 to 15 minutes, brushing generously with barbecue sauce and turning every 5 minutes to cook evenly.
